---
title: "My Fancy Project"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: page-listing
    contents:
      - "*.qmd"
      - "!jane.qmd"
      - "!john.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: false
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, title]
  - id: authors-listing
    contents:
      - "jane.qmd"
      - "john.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    image-height: "300px"
    fields: [image, title]
---

::: callout-important
For some inspiration on how to customize your site, [check out the gallery here](https://quarto.org/docs/gallery/#websites){target="_blank"}... and remember to remove this callout box BEFORE publishing your site at the end of the semester!
:::

::: {#page-listing}
:::  

## Authors

::: {#authors-listing}
:::
